calendar.matters:
Second Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Under Real Estate Listing Contract; And Appointment Of Arbitrator
Off Calendar Jul-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER URBAN REAL ESTATE GROUP, INCORPORATED'S Second Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Under Real Estate Listing Contract; And Appointment Of Arbitrator is OFF CALENDAR, moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and the Court's June 22, 2016 minute order providing moving party an opportunity to comply with SFLR 2.7B. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Second Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Under Real Estate Listing Contract; And Appointment Of Arbitrator
Off Calendar Jun-22-2016 Continued To Jul-20-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER URBAN REAL ESTATE GROUP's Second Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Under Real Estate Listing Contract; And Appointment Of Arbitrator is continued to July 20, 2016. Moving party is ordered to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in accordance with SFLR 2.7B no later than June 30, 2016 with a cover letter reflect new hearing date. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Under Real Estate Listing Contract; And Appointment Of Arbitrator
Off Calendar Jun-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER URBAN REAL ESTATE GROUP's Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Under Real Estate Listing Contract; And Appointment Of Arbitrator is OFF CALENDAR, amended notice on file. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Under Real Estate Listing Contract; And Appointment Of Arbitrator
Off Calendar May-20-2016 Continued To Jun-22-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER URBAN REAL ESTATE GROUP, INCORPORATED A CALIFORNIA Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Under Real Estate Listing Contract; And Appointment Of Arbitrator is re-noticed to June 22, 2016.
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Under Real Estate Listing Contract; And Appointment Of Arbitrator
Off Calendar Apr-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances: The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER URBAN REAL ESTATE GROUP, INCORPORATED A CALIFORNIA Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Under Real Estate Listing Contract; And Appointment Of Arbitrator is OFF CALENDAR, re-Noticed for May 20, 2016. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
